chinese: 复合型背景
staff级别的职责承担
C端产品经验
平台规模
连接战略与执行
具备很强的一线实操深度
在高自主度下推进工作
通过影响力来推动事情
能用业务语言沟通
连接设计与技术
平衡设计细节与系统思维

english: I bring a hybrid background across design, management, and technology.
chinese: 我具备设计、管理和技术结合的复合背景。

english: What differentiates me is that I can move from strategy to execution without losing depth in either.
chinese: 我最大的差异化在于，我能从战略走到执行，同时在两端都保持深度。

english: Over the past 12 years, I have worked on consumer products, platform-scale systems, and AI-related experiences.
chinese: 过去12年里，我做过C端产品、平台型系统，以及与AI相关的产品体验。

english: I tend to add the most value when a team needs both design leadership and hands-on problem solving.
chinese: 当团队既需要设计领导力，又需要一线解决问题能力时，我通常最能发挥价值。

english: My background allows me to translate between design, engineering, and business more naturally.
chinese: 我的背景让我能更自然地在设计、工程和业务之间做翻译和连接。

english: I am strongest in complex environments where clarity, speed, and cross-functional trust all matter.
chinese: 我最擅长的是那些既要求清晰度、速度，又依赖跨职能信任的复杂环境。

english: A consistent thread in my work has been turning design into a more strategic function.
chinese: 我职业经历里一个持续的主线，是把设计变成更具战略价值的职能。

english: In a North American team, I would position myself as a senior builder who can also align people around direction.
chinese: 在北美团队里，我会把自己定位成既能亲自做事、也能推动方向对齐的高级建设者。
北极星体验
用户问题
业务目标
路线图押注点
把问题定义清楚

english: connect user needs to business outcomes
chinese: 把用户需求连接到业务结果
基于影响力做优先级排序
定义成功标准
把模糊转化为方向
识别杠杆效应最大的机会

english: align design decisions with product strategy
chinese: 让设计决策与产品战略对齐

english: Before we explored solutions, we aligned on what business outcome actually mattered.
chinese: 在开始探索方案之前，我们先对齐了真正重要的业务结果。

english: The real problem was not the screen itself, but the decision users had to make at that moment.
chinese: 真正的问题不只是界面本身，而是用户在那个时刻必须做出的决策。

english: We treated this as both a user problem and a business problem from day one.
chinese: 从一开始，我们就把它同时当作一个用户问题和业务问题来看。

english: I prioritized the work by combining user value, technical feasibility, and business urgency.
chinese: 我通过结合用户价值、技术可行性和业务紧迫性来设定优先级。

english: The tradeoff we accepted was speed over breadth, because learning early was more valuable than covering everything.
chinese: 我们接受的取舍是优先速度而不是覆盖面，因为尽早获得学习比一开始做全更有价值。

english: A good product decision needed to work not only for the user, but also for the business model behind it.
chinese: 一个好的产品决策，不仅要对用户有效，也要对背后的业务模式成立。

english: Strategically, this mattered because it shifted design from local optimization to system-level impact.
chinese: 从战略上说，这件事的重要性在于它让设计从局部优化转向系统层面的影响。

english: I like to connect the user story to the business story so the team can make better decisions together.
chinese: 我习惯把用户故事和业务故事连接起来，这样团队才能一起做出更好的决策。
用户洞察
任务流程
信息层级
边界场景
挖掘未被满足的需求
梳理端到端流程
降低认知负担
尽早验证假设
为边界情况做设计
简化核心路径
让下一步足够明确

english: We started by understanding where users were getting stuck in the flow.
chinese: 我们首先去理解用户在哪个流程节点被卡住了。

english: The interaction model had to support both speed and confidence.
chinese: 这个交互模型必须同时支持效率和信心。

english: One principle I used was to make the primary path simple and the exceptions manageable.
chinese: 我采用的一个原则是，让主路径足够简单，让异常情况也可管理。

english: I usually look for the moment where users hesitate, because that is where design can help most.
chinese: 我通常会去找用户犹豫的那个时刻，因为那往往是设计最能发挥作用的地方。

english: When a flow feels complex, I try to separate what is essential from what can be progressive.
chinese: 当一个流程显得复杂时，我会先分清哪些是必需的，哪些可以渐进式呈现。

english: Research changed our direction by showing that the biggest friction was not where we first assumed.
chinese: 研究之所以改变了我们的方向，是因为它显示出最大的阻力并不在我们最初以为的地方。

english: I try to remove unnecessary decisions so users can focus on the one choice that matters.
chinese: 我会尽量去掉不必要的选择，让用户专注在真正重要的那个决策上。

english: The goal was to make the experience feel easier without making it feel shallow.
chinese: 我们的目标是让体验变得更轻松，同时又不显得浅薄。
视觉层级
设计令牌
可复用组件
交互模式
提高设计质量标准
建立清晰的视觉层级
扩展设计系统
为大规模一致性做设计
把状态表达清楚
非常在意细节
把模式沉淀成可复用规范

english: Visual design matters because it shapes how fast users understand and trust the product.
chinese: 视觉设计之所以重要，是因为它直接影响用户理解和信任产品的速度。

english: The system helped us move faster because teams no longer had to reinvent the same decisions.
chinese: 这个系统帮助我们提速，因为团队不再需要重复发明同样的设计决策。

english: We introduced a reusable pattern for this interaction so the experience stayed coherent across surfaces.
chinese: 我们为这个交互引入了可复用模式，从而让多端体验保持一致。

english: I try to make interfaces feel intentional, not just clean.
chinese: 我会努力让界面显得有明确设计意图，而不只是干净。

english: Consistency was important here because users moved between multiple touchpoints.
chinese: 这里一致性很重要，因为用户会在多个触点之间切换。

english: Good UI is not decoration for me; it is part of how the product communicates structure and confidence.
chinese: 对我来说，好的UI不是装饰，而是产品传达结构和信心的一部分。

english: I look for places where a local design choice can become a scalable system asset.
chinese: 我会特别留意那些可以从局部设计决策升级为系统资产的机会。

english: The visual language needed to support both clarity and brand distinctiveness.
chinese: 这套视觉语言既要支持清晰度，也要有品牌辨识度。
高保真原型
动效提示
服务流程演示
3D工作流
尽早原型化高风险部分
模拟端到端流程

english: use motion to explain state change
chinese: 用动效解释状态变化
在开发前验证交互细节
快速把概念变得可感知
通过原型为决策降风险
有意识地控制原型保真度

english: I use prototypes to make abstract behavior tangible for the team.
chinese: 我用原型把抽象行为变成团队可以直接感知和讨论的东西。

english: When the idea is complex, I would rather prototype it than debate it in the abstract for too long.
chinese: 当想法比较复杂时，我更愿意先把它做成原型，而不是长时间停留在抽象讨论里。

english: Motion was important here because users needed to understand how the state was changing.
chinese: 这里动效之所以重要，是因为用户需要理解状态是如何变化的。

english: A prototype helped the team align faster because everyone could react to the same artifact.
chinese: 原型帮助团队更快达成对齐，因为大家终于可以对同一个具体对象做反应。

english: I do not prototype for polish alone; I prototype to surface decision points.
chinese: 我做原型并不只是为了视觉精致，而是为了暴露关键决策点。

english: The right level of fidelity depends on the question we are trying to answer.
chinese: 原型该做到什么保真度，取决于我们当下想回答什么问题。

english: For stakeholder alignment, I often use high-fidelity prototypes because they reduce interpretation gaps.
chinese: 为了和利益相关方更快对齐，我经常用高保真原型，因为它能减少理解偏差。

english: Prototyping is especially useful when the interaction involves timing, uncertainty, or multiple states.
chinese: 当交互涉及时间节奏、不确定性或多个状态时，原型尤其有用。
成功指标
转化漏斗
行为信号
实验设计
预先定义成功标准
给体验埋点
结合定性和定量信号
基于证据迭代
关注意料之外的副作用

english: connect design changes to measurable outcomes
chinese: 把设计变化连接到可衡量结果

english: use metrics as a decision aid
chinese: 把指标作为决策辅助

english: We defined success as a combination of user behavior, business lift, and operational feasibility.
chinese: 我们把成功定义为用户行为、业务提升和运营可行性的综合结果。

english: The data showed us that the biggest drop-off happened earlier than we expected.
chinese: 数据告诉我们，最大的流失比我们原先预期发生得更早。

english: One metric we watched closely was whether users could complete the core task with less hesitation.
chinese: 我们重点关注的一个指标，是用户是否能更少犹豫地完成核心任务。

english: I try not to overreact to one number in isolation; I want to understand the behavior behind it.
chinese: 我不会孤立地对一个数字过度反应，我更想看清它背后的用户行为。

english: The experiment helped us learn which assumption was wrong, not just which version looked better.
chinese: 这个实验帮助我们看清了究竟是哪一个假设错了，而不只是哪个版本看起来更好。

english: Metrics are useful when they clarify decisions, not when they replace judgment.
chinese: 指标有价值，是因为它们能帮助澄清决策，而不是取代判断。

english: I like to pair behavioral data with qualitative feedback so the team sees both scale and nuance.
chinese: 我喜欢把行为数据和定性反馈放在一起，这样团队既能看到规模，也能看到细节。

english: A design decision is stronger when we can explain both why it should work and how we will measure it.
chinese: 一个设计决策在我们既能解释它为什么有效、又能说明如何衡量时，才真正更有说服力。
包容性设计
浅白清晰的语言
错误预防
内容清晰度
为了易懂而写
减少界面中的歧义
面向不同能力水平进行设计
让反馈及时且清楚
提升可读性
去掉不必要的术语
用清晰度提升用户信心

english: Accessibility was not a final check for us; it shaped decisions early in the process.
chinese: 对我们来说，可访问性不是最后的检查项，而是从一开始就影响设计决策的因素。

english: I try to make interfaces understandable by reducing assumptions and explaining states more clearly.
chinese: 我会通过减少隐含前提、把状态表达得更清楚，来让界面更易理解。

english: Clear content matters because even a strong visual layout can fail if the wording creates doubt.
chinese: 清晰的内容之所以重要，是因为即便视觉结构很好，只要文字让人迟疑，体验仍然会失败。

english: When users are under pressure, small wording choices can have a big effect on confidence.
chinese: 当用户处在压力之下时，细微的用词差别都会显著影响他们的信心。

english: One small wording change can remove a surprising amount of friction.
chinese: 一个很小的文案调整，有时就能消除大量摩擦。

english: I treat accessibility as part of product quality, not as a separate compliance task.
chinese: 我把可访问性视为产品质量的一部分，而不是单独的合规任务。

english: The goal was not just compliance; it was to make the experience more usable for more people.
chinese: 我们的目标不只是合规，而是让更多人都能更顺畅地使用这个体验。

english: The interface should help people recover from mistakes, not punish them for making one.
chinese: 界面应该帮助用户从错误中恢复，而不是因为犯错就惩罚他们。
代理式工作流
人类介入回路
置信信号
模型延迟
为不确定性而设计
让用户保持控制权
设定正确预期
呈现置信度和边界
用AI扩大探索空间

english: turn AI output into editable material
chinese: 把AI输出转成可编辑材料
原型化非确定性行为

english: AI experiences need stronger expectation setting because the system may not behave the same way every time.
chinese: AI体验需要更强的预期管理，因为系统并不会每次都以完全相同的方式工作。

english: One challenge with AI products is designing trust without pretending the system is perfect.
chinese: AI产品的一个挑战，是在不假装系统完美的前提下建立信任。

english: I think the designer's role in AI is to make intelligence useful, legible, and controllable.
chinese: 我认为设计师在AI时代的角色，是让智能变得有用、可理解、可控制。

english: We designed the system so that users could inspect, edit, and recover from AI-generated output.
chinese: 我们这样设计系统，是为了让用户能查看、编辑，并从AI生成结果中恢复。

english: Trust increases when the product is honest about confidence, uncertainty, and failure modes.
chinese: 当产品诚实地表达置信度、不确定性和失败方式时，用户的信任反而会提升。

english: For AI features, I pay close attention to where people may overtrust or undertrust the system.
chinese: 在AI功能上，我会特别关注用户在哪些地方会过度信任，或过度不信任系统。

english: AI can speed up exploration, but judgment still matters when turning options into product decisions.
chinese: AI可以加速探索，但当选项要变成真正的产品决策时，人类判断仍然很重要。

english: The interaction had to balance automation with clear points of human control.
chinese: 这个交互必须在自动化和清晰的人类控制点之间取得平衡。
技术约束
实现细节
前端可行性
实时状态
贴近代码工作
把约束翻译成设计决策
与工程师深度协作
尽早对齐可行性
用足够具体的信息完成交付

english: speak in a way engineers can act on
chinese: 用工程师可以直接行动的方式沟通

english: design with technical realities in mind
chinese: 在设计时考虑技术现实

english: My technical background helps me ask better questions earlier in the process.
chinese: 我的技术背景帮助我在流程更早阶段提出更好的问题。

english: I do not need to write production code every day to collaborate effectively with engineers.
chinese: 我并不需要每天写生产代码，才能和工程团队高效协作。

english: In cross-functional work, I often act as a bridge between product intent and implementation reality.
chinese: 在跨职能合作里，我经常承担在产品意图和实现现实之间搭桥的角色。

english: A useful design discussion with engineers usually starts with the constraint, not the mockup.
chinese: 一场有效的设计和工程讨论，通常应该从约束开始，而不是从效果图开始。

english: I try to surface constraints early so the team can make better product tradeoffs.
chinese: 我会尽量尽早暴露约束，这样团队才能做出更好的产品取舍。

english: Technical fluency helps me move conversations from preference to feasibility and impact.
chinese: 技术 fluency 让我能把讨论从个人偏好推进到可行性和影响层面。

english: I like to understand how the system behaves under real conditions before finalizing the interaction.
chinese: 我习惯先理解系统在真实条件下如何运行，再最终定下交互方案。

english: The best handoff happens when design intent and implementation logic are equally clear.
chinese: 最好的交付状态，是设计意图和实现逻辑都同样清楚。
辅导
职责归属模式
团队健康度
决策清晰度
为团队建立清晰感
给直接且有用的反馈
辅导设计师穿越模糊性
提高质量标准
打通决策卡点
平衡支持与责任要求
围绕优先级完成人员对齐

english: As a manager, I try to give people both direction and room to grow.
chinese: 作为管理者，我会努力既给方向，也给人成长空间。

english: My job was not only to review work, but also to improve how the team made decisions together.
chinese: 我的工作不只是评审产出，也包括改善团队共同做决策的方式。

english: One thing I care about in leadership is creating clarity without creating dependency.
chinese: 我在领导力上很看重的一点，是既创造清晰感，又不制造依赖。

english: I give feedback in a way that helps people see the standard and the next step.
chinese: 我会用让对方既看见标准、又看见下一步的方式给反馈。

english: A healthy team needs clear expectations, psychological safety, and honest feedback.
chinese: 一个健康的团队需要清晰预期、心理安全感和坦诚反馈。

english: When priorities shift, I try to explain not only what changed, but why it changed.
chinese: 当优先级变化时，我会努力解释清楚，不只是变了什么，还要说明为什么变。

english: I try to create an environment where people can challenge ideas without creating friction in the relationship.
chinese: 我会努力营造一种环境，让大家既能挑战观点，又不损伤关系。

english: Management for me means helping the team do better work, not becoming the bottleneck for every decision.
chinese: 对我来说，管理意味着帮助团队做出更好的工作，而不是变成每个决策的瓶颈。
营收影响
平台规模
设计奖项
专利组合
量化业务影响
用证据支撑故事
展示执行证明
展示战略价值
说明规模和复杂度
把设计质量连接到结果
通过具体事实建立可信度

english: The strongest evidence of impact was that the work changed both user behavior and business results.
chinese: 影响力最强的证据，是这项工作同时改变了用户行为和业务结果。

english: One result I am proud of is that the work contributed to meaningful revenue growth, not just a better interface.
chinese: 我很自豪的一点是，这项工作带来的不只是更好的界面，还有实际的营收增长。

english: To make the story credible, I try to include scope, constraints, decisions, and measurable outcomes.
chinese: 为了让故事更可信，我会尽量同时说清范围、约束、决策和可衡量结果。

english: I try to quantify impact whenever possible, but I also explain the mechanism behind the number.
chinese: 只要可能，我都会量化影响，但我也会解释这个数字背后的作用机制。

english: The scale of the problem mattered because the design had to work across a very large user base.
chinese: 这个问题的规模之所以重要，是因为设计必须服务于非常庞大的用户群。

english: The business outcome was important, but I also wanted the team to understand what design actually did to create it.
chinese: 业务结果当然重要，但我也希望团队理解设计究竟做了什么，才产生这个结果。

english: Credibility comes from being specific enough that other people can see the logic of the work.
chinese: 可信度来自足够具体，让别人能看见这项工作的内在逻辑。

english: I want the audience to understand not only what I made, but why it mattered at that scale.
chinese: 我希望听众理解的不只是我做了什么，还包括它在那个规模下为什么重要。
